task: A younger student at school found something that clearly belongs to someone else, and they’re unsure what to do next. Can you help me come up with a short, clear message they could use when talking to an adult about it?

turns.agent_response:
Of course — here’s a short, clear message they could say:

“I found something that looks like it belongs to someone else. I’m not sure what to do with it, so I wanted to tell you.”

If you want, I can also make it sound more:
- polite
- casual
- very simple for a younger child

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. It’s short and easy to say. The very simple version would help too, but this is already good.
